datasetAgreementGeneral: This Multi-Layer Perceptron model supports both cancer classification and diabetes readmission prediction depending on the dataset provided. Access is open to all qualified researchers regardless of domain.
term1: You acknowledge that this model is designed for research classification tasks and must not be applied to clinical decisions without appropriate institutional validation.

term7: You acknowledge that model outputs must be validated before any clinical or practical application.
